name: Graph Data API
summary: Backend API for graph data storage, retrieval, and manipulation
goals: Provide RESTful endpoints for graph CRUD operations

specDetail.description: Exposes graph data API endpoints under /api/graph. GET /api/graph/:projectId returns the full graph structure. Supports creating, updating, and deleting nodes and edges via POST/PUT/DELETE endpoints.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: Specific node ID for targeted operations

parameters.name: depth
parameters.description: Traversal depth for subtree queries (default unlimited)

parameters.name: includeEdges
parameters.description: Whether to include edge data in the response (default true)

constraints: Must support graphs with up to 10,000 nodes without performance degradation
Must validate all graph mutations against the schema
Must return consistent graph snapshots (no partial updates visible)

acceptanceCriteria.given: a project has a graph with nodes and edges
acceptanceCriteria.then: the complete graph structure with all nodes and edges is returned

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
